notes:
# Steady 2.19.0

## Home
- **Steady League** and **Usage** now sit in the app grid like real apps (middle of page 1) — not only in the ⋯ menu
- **Wallpaper chooser**: phone wallpaper, custom photo, or Steady sky — with a soft forest wash so icons stay readable
- Custom photos save on-device; blur still available on strong phones

## Steady League
- Clear **score breakdown** in the app: exactly what Focus / Work / Learn / streak / resisted opens / Fun add or subtract
- Reward-point math shown the same way
- Track formulas explained (Focus, Essentials, Sprint)
- Website League page mirrors the same point system

## Notes
- Same protection model as 2.18.x — Accessibility, Always-On VPN, and locks unchanged
